Related Entities

  • hospital NOVANT HEALTH ROWAN MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital W.G. (BILL) HEFNER SALISBURY VA MEDICAL CENTER (SALSBURY) 4-star overall rating
  • snf Salisbury Rehabilitation and Nursing Center 1-star, 185 beds
  • snf Piedmont Health & Rehab Center 3-star, 58 beds
  • snf Trinity Oaks 4-star, 115 beds
  • snf Autumn Care of Salisbury 3-star, 97 beds
  • snf Compass Healthcare and Rehab Rowan, LLC 1-star, 70 beds
  • snf Big Elm Retirement and Nursing Centers 2-star, 50 beds
  • snf The Laurels of Salisbury 2-star, 80 beds
  • snf Liberty Commons Nsg and Rehab Ctr of Rowan County 3-star, 90 beds
  • snf NC State Veterans Home - Salisbury 3-star, 99 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
